name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Place barbell across upper traps, unrack, brace core, descend until hips are below knees, drive up through heels.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Rest barbell on front delts with elbows high, brace core, squat to depth, drive up keeping torso upright.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold a dumbbell at chest height, squat down keeping elbows inside knees, drive up through heels.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit in leg press, place feet shoulder-width on platform, lower sled under control, press up without locking knees.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot elevated on bench, hold dumbbells, lower until rear knee nearly touches floor, drive up through front heel.

name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, squat down keeping chest up, drive up through heels.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit in machine, extend legs fully, squeeze quads at top, lower under control.

name: Wall Sit
instructions: Lean back against wall, slide down until thighs are parallel to ground, hold position.

name: Sissy Squat
instructions: Stand on toes, lean torso back while bending knees forward, lower until thighs are parallel, return to start.

name: Dumbbell Step-Up
instructions: Hold dumbbells, step one foot onto bench, drive through that heel to stand up, step down and repeat.

name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Hold dumbbells, step one foot back, lower until both knees are at 90 degrees, drive through front heel to return.

name: Pistol Squat
instructions: Stand on one leg, extend other leg forward, squat to full depth, drive back up.

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width, grip bar outside knees, brace core, drive through floor keeping bar close to body, lock out hips at top.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Wide stance, grip bar between legs, push knees out, brace and drive hips forward to stand.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold barbell at hip height, hinge at hips pushing them back, lower bar along legs until hamstring stretch, return by driving hips forward.

name: Trap Bar Deadlift
instructions: Stand inside trap bar, grip handles, brace core, stand up by extending hips and knees simultaneously.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge at hips, swing kettlebell back between legs, snap hips forward to drive bell to chest height, let it fall and repeat.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of thighs, hinge at hips, lower dumbbells along legs, return by driving hips forward.

name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand on one leg, hinge forward at hips extending rear leg back, lower dumbbell toward floor, return to standing.

name: Good Morning
instructions: Bar on upper back, slight knee bend, hinge at hips until torso is near parallel to floor, return upright.

name: Cable Pull-Through
instructions: Face away from low cable, straddle rope attachment, hinge at hips, pull through by snapping hips forward.

name: Back Extension
instructions: Position hips on pad, cross arms over chest, lower torso down, extend back up to neutral spine position.

name: Superman
instructions: Lie face down, simultaneously raise arms, chest, and legs off the ground, hold briefly, lower back down.

name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench, grip bar slightly wider than shoulders, lower to chest, press up to lockout.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench with dumbbells at chest, press up to full extension, lower with control.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degree incline, grip bar, lower to upper chest, press to lockout.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degrees, press dumbbells from upper chest to full extension.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Hands shoulder-width on floor, body straight, lower chest to ground, press back up.

name: Incline Push-Up
instructions: Place hands on elevated surface (bench, step), perform push-up with body in a straight line.

name: Knee Push-Up
instructions: Push-up position with knees on the ground, lower chest to floor, press back up.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Stand between cables set at chest height, bring handles together in front of chest with slight elbow bend, return slowly.

name: Pec Deck
instructions: Sit in machine, bring pads together in front of chest, squeeze, return slowly.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Lie on bench, hold dumbbells above chest, lower arms out wide with slight bend, bring back together.

name: Diamond Push-Up
instructions: Hands close together forming a diamond shape under chest, perform push-up keeping elbows close to body.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Stand with bar at shoulders, brace core, press bar overhead to lockout, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Seated or standing, press dumbbells from shoulder height to overhead, lower with control.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Start with dumbbells in front of face palms facing you, rotate and press overhead in one fluid motion.

name: Landmine Press
instructions: Hold end of barbell at shoulder, press up and away at an angle, lower with control.

name: Pike Push-Up
instructions: Assume downward dog position, bend elbows to lower head toward floor, press back up.

name: Handstand Push-Up
instructions: Kick up to handstand against wall, lower head toward floor by bending arms, press back up.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, raise arms out to sides until parallel with floor, lower slowly.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand beside low cable, raise arm out to side to shoulder height, lower with control.

name: Front Raise
instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of thighs, raise one or both arms forward to shoulder height, lower slowly.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Set cable at face height with rope, pull toward face separating ends, squeeze shoulder blades, return slowly.

name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
instructions: Hinge at hips, grip bar shoulder-width, row bar to lower chest, squeeze shoulder blades, lower with control.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit at cable station, pull handle to lower chest, squeeze shoulder blades, return slowly.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: One hand and knee on bench, row dumbbell to hip with other arm, squeeze lat, lower with control.

name: Chest-Supported Row
instructions: Lie face down on incline bench, row dumbbells up squeezing shoulder blades together, lower with control.

name: Inverted Row
instructions: Hang under a bar at hip height, body straight, pull chest to bar, lower with control.

name: Band Pull-Apart
instructions: Hold band at arms length in front of you, pull apart by squeezing shoulder blades, return slowly.

name: Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Bend at hips, hold dumbbells below, raise arms out to sides squeezing rear delts, lower slowly.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from bar with overhand grip, pull chin above bar by driving elbows down, lower with control.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Hang from bar with underhand grip, pull chin above bar, lower with control.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at pulldown station, grip bar wider than shoulders, pull to upper chest, return slowly.

name: Assisted Pull-Up
instructions: Loop band around bar and under knee or foot, perform pull-up with band assistance.

name: Cable Pullover
instructions: Face cable with attachment set high, arms extended, pull down in arc to thighs, return slowly.

name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
instructions: Stand at cable station, arms extended, pull bar down in arc to thighs keeping arms straight, return slowly.

name: Plank
instructions: Forearms and toes on floor, body in straight line, brace core, hold position.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back, arms up, knees at 90 degrees. Extend opposite arm and leg while keeping low back pressed to floor.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel with hands on ab wheel, roll forward extending body, pull back to start using core.

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Stand perpendicular to cable, hold handle at chest, press straight out resisting rotation, return to chest.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from bar, raise legs to parallel or higher by curling pelvis, lower with control.

name: Lying Leg Raise
instructions: Lie on back, hands under hips, raise legs to vertical, lower slowly without touching floor.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel in front of cable, hold rope behind head, crunch down contracting abs, return slowly.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Lie on side, prop up on forearm, raise hips to form straight line, hold position.

name: Bird Dog
instructions: On all fours, extend opposite arm and leg, hold briefly, return and switch sides.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with knees bent, lean back slightly, rotate torso side to side. Add weight to increase difficulty.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Push-up position, drive one knee to chest at a time in rapid alternation.

name: Farmer Walk
instructions: Hold heavy dumbbells or kettlebells at sides, walk with upright posture for distance or time.

name: Suitcase Carry
instructions: Hold heavy dumbbell or kettlebell in one hand, walk with upright posture resisting lateral lean.

name: Overhead Carry
instructions: Press dumbbell or kettlebell overhead, lock arm, walk with control maintaining upright posture.

name: Plate Carry
instructions: Hold a weight plate against chest (bear hug) or at arms length, walk for distance or time.

name: Waiter Walk
instructions: Hold kettlebell bottoms-up in one hand at shoulder height, walk maintaining control and upright posture.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Stand with barbell at arms length, curl bar up by bending elbows, lower with control.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie on bench, hold bar above chest with narrow grip, lower to forehead by bending elbows, extend back up.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, curl up while supinating wrists, lower with control.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbells with neutral grip (palms facing), curl up keeping wrists neutral, lower with control.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand at cable station, push bar or rope down by extending elbows, return with control.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold dumbbell overhead with both hands, lower behind head by bending elbows, extend back up.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Sit on bench, brace elbow against inner thigh, curl dumbbell up with full contraction, lower slowly.

name: Tricep Dip
instructions: Support yourself on dip bars, lower body by bending arms to 90 degrees, press back up.

name: Bench Dip
instructions: Hands on bench behind you, feet forward, lower body by bending elbows, press back up.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on edge of step holding dumbbells, raise up on toes, lower heels below step level.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Sit in machine with pad on knees, raise heels as high as possible, lower slowly.

name: Bodyweight Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on edge of a step, raise up on toes, lower heels below step level. Use one leg for added difficulty.

name: Lying Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on machine, curl heels toward glutes, squeeze hamstrings, lower slowly.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
instructions: Kneel with ankles anchored, slowly lower torso forward under control, catch yourself and push back up.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit on floor with upper back against bench, bar across hips, drive hips up squeezing glutes, lower slowly.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat, drive hips up squeezing glutes at top, lower slowly.

name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back, one foot flat on floor, other leg extended, drive hips up with single leg, lower slowly.

name: Adductor Machine
instructions: Sit in machine, squeeze legs together against resistance, return slowly.

name: Copenhagen Plank
instructions: Side plank position with top foot on bench, bottom foot off ground, hold while squeezing top leg into bench.

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Rest forearms on bench, palms up, curl dumbbells by flexing wrists, lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
instructions: Hold heavy dumbbells at sides, shrug shoulders straight up toward ears, hold briefly, lower.

name: Easy Run
instructions: Run at a conversational pace (zone 2), maintaining relaxed form and steady breathing.

name: Walk/Run Intervals
instructions: Alternate between walking and jogging intervals (e.g., 1 min run / 1 min walk), adjusting ratio as fitness builds.

name: Tempo Run
instructions: Warm up 10 min, run at comfortably hard pace (lactate threshold, zone 4) for sustained period, cool down 10 min.

name: Interval Run
instructions: Warm up, then alternate hard efforts (e.g., 400m-1200m at 5K pace) with easy jog recoveries. Cool down.

name: Long Run
instructions: Run at easy to moderate pace for an extended duration to build aerobic endurance. Stay in zone 2-3.

name: Threshold Intervals
instructions: Warm up, then run 3-5 x 8-10min at threshold pace with 2-3min easy jog between. Cool down.

name: Fartlek Run
instructions: Unstructured speed play: mix easy running with random surges of varying intensity and duration.

name: Hill Repeats
instructions: Warm up, then run hard up a hill (60-90sec), jog down for recovery. Repeat 6-12 times. Cool down.

name: Recovery Run
instructions: Very easy effort run (zone 1-2) to promote blood flow and recovery. Should feel effortless.

name: Sprint Intervals
instructions: Warm up thoroughly. Sprint 100-200m at near-max effort, walk or jog 2-3min recovery. Repeat 6-10 times.

name: Endurance Ride
instructions: Ride at steady zone 2 effort for the duration. Focus on cadence 85-95 RPM and fueling for rides over 90 min.

name: Sweet Spot Intervals
instructions: Warm up 15 min, ride 2-3 x 15-20min at 88-93% FTP (sweet spot zone) with 5min easy between. Cool down.

name: Threshold Ride
instructions: Warm up, ride 2-3 x 10-15min at FTP (zone 4), with 5min easy between intervals. Cool down.

name: VO2max Intervals (Bike)
instructions: Warm up, ride 5-8 x 3-5min at 105-120% FTP with equal rest between. Cool down.

name: Recovery Ride
instructions: Very easy spin (zone 1) to promote recovery. Keep power below 55% FTP and RPM comfortable.

name: Tempo Ride
instructions: Warm up, ride at 76-87% FTP (zone 3) for sustained period, maintaining steady effort. Cool down.

name: Hill Climb Intervals
instructions: Find a climb or set trainer to high resistance. Ride 4-6 x 5-8min at threshold effort seated, descend/easy between.

name: CSS Repeats
instructions: Swim repeats (e.g., 10x200m or 5x400m) at CSS pace (threshold) with 10-20 sec rest between. Warm up and cool down.

name: Endurance Swim
instructions: Continuous swimming at easy to moderate effort (zone 2). Focus on stroke technique and bilateral breathing.

name: Swim Intervals
instructions: Mix of sprint and threshold sets (e.g., 8x100m fast on 15sec rest, or 4x200m at VO2max pace). Include warm up/cool down.

name: Swim Drill Session
instructions: Focus on technique drills: catch-up, fingertip drag, fist drill, kick sets. Easy pace throughout.

name: Open Water Swim
instructions: Swim in open water practicing sighting, drafting, and pacing. Always swim with a buddy or safety support.

name: Brick Run (Bike-to-Run)
instructions: Ride at moderate effort, then immediately transition to a run. Start run easy, build to goal race pace.

name: Dumbbell Clean and Press
instructions: Start with dumbbells at sides, hinge and explosively clean to shoulders, press overhead, lower and repeat.

name: Turkish Get-Up
instructions: Lie on back holding kettlebell overhead, follow a sequence of movements to stand up while keeping weight overhead, reverse to return.

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold kettlebell by horns at chest, squat to depth keeping elbows inside knees, stand up.

name: Kettlebell Snatch
instructions: Swing kettlebell between legs, explosively drive hips to pull bell overhead in one motion, punch through at top.

name: Decline Push-Up
instructions: Feet elevated on bench or step, hands on floor, perform push-up with body in straight line.

name: Pendlay Row
instructions: From dead stop on floor with torso parallel to ground, explosively row bar to lower chest, lower back to floor each rep.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench, grip bar with hands shoulder-width or narrower, lower to lower chest, press up focusing on triceps.

name: Cable Crossover
instructions: Set cables high, step forward, bring handles together in a downward arc squeezing chest, return slowly.

name: Neutral-Grip Pull-Up
instructions: Grip parallel handles with palms facing each other, pull chin above bar, lower with control.

name: Meadows Row
instructions: Stand perpendicular to landmine, grip end of barbell with one hand, row to hip with elbow driving back.

name: EZ Bar Curl
instructions: Grip EZ bar on angled portion, curl up keeping elbows stationary, lower with control.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Rest upper arms on preacher pad, curl weight up squeezing biceps, lower slowly.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Stand at low cable, curl handle up keeping elbows at sides, lower with control.

name: Close-Grip Lat Pulldown
instructions: Use narrow V-bar or close-grip handle, pull to upper chest emphasizing lower lats, return slowly.

name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit on bench with back support, press dumbbells from shoulder height to overhead, lower with control.

name: Behind-the-Neck Pulldown
instructions: Pull bar behind head to upper traps, squeezing lats and rhomboids, return slowly. Use light weight and full control.

name: Barbell Upright Row
instructions: Hold barbell with narrow grip, pull up along body to chin height keeping elbows high, lower slowly.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Position shoulders under pads, feet shoulder-width on platform, squat down and drive back up.

name: Safety Bar Squat
instructions: Position safety bar on upper back, grip handles, squat to depth, drive up. Easier on shoulders than straight bar.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle barbell in landmine, grip with V-handle, row to chest keeping back flat, lower with control.

name: Reverse-Grip Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge at hips, grip bar underhand, row to lower abdomen squeezing lats, lower with control.

name: Decline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set bench to slight decline, press dumbbells from lower chest to full extension, lower with control.

name: Band-Assisted Pull-Up
instructions: Loop resistance band around bar and under feet or knees, perform pull-up with band assistance.

name: Band Face Pull
instructions: Anchor band at face height, pull toward face separating hands, squeeze shoulder blades, return slowly.

name: Resistance Band Row
instructions: Anchor band at chest height, pull handles to ribs squeezing shoulder blades, return with control.

name: Resistance Band Squat
instructions: Stand on band, hold ends at shoulders, squat down and stand up against band resistance.

name: Resistance Band Overhead Press
instructions: Stand on band, hold ends at shoulders, press overhead against band resistance.

name: Resistance Band Curl
instructions: Stand on band, curl handles up keeping elbows at sides, lower with control.

name: Resistance Band Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Anchor band overhead, push down by extending elbows, return with control.

name: Jump Squat
instructions: Squat down then explode upward into a jump, land softly and immediately descend into next rep.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand facing box, swing arms and jump onto box landing softly with both feet, step down and repeat.

name: Burpee
instructions: Drop to push-up, perform push-up, jump feet forward, stand and jump. Repeat continuously.

name: Wide-Grip Pull-Up
instructions: Grip bar wider than shoulder-width, pull chin above bar emphasizing lat stretch, lower with control.

name: Deficit Deadlift
instructions: Stand on 1-2 inch platform, perform conventional deadlift from increased range of motion.

name: Power Clean
instructions: Start with bar on floor, pull explosively extending hips, catch bar on front delts in partial squat position.

name: Snatch-Grip Deadlift
instructions: Wide grip on barbell, perform deadlift with increased range of motion and upper back demand.

name: Weighted Pull-Up
instructions: Hang weight from belt, perform pull-up pulling chin above bar, lower with control.

name: Weighted Dip
instructions: Hang weight from belt, lower body on dip bars until upper arms are parallel, press back up.

name: Muscle-Up
instructions: From dead hang, explosively pull and transition over the bar into a dip position, press to lockout.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on bench, barbell across hips, drive hips up squeezing glutes at top, lower under control.

name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
instructions: Like RDL but with straighter legs, hinge forward lowering bar, feel deep hamstring stretch, return by driving hips.
